SEARCH
Package compiler.simulation

Interface InterpreterVisitor

All Known Implementing Classes:
ProgramCritterInterpreter
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface InterpreterVisitor
Produces the next runtime action for a critter.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Action
    interpret(Critter critter, World world)
    Chooses the next action for a critter in the current world state.
    default InterpreterVisitor
    offspringCopy()
    Creates an interpreter copy suitable for an offspring critter.

  • Method Details

    • interpret

      Action interpret(Critter critter, World world)
      Chooses the next action for a critter in the current world state.
      Parameters:
      critter - acting critter
      world - world snapshot/mutable context
      Returns:
      action to execute this turn

    • offspringCopy

      default InterpreterVisitor offspringCopy()
      Creates an interpreter copy suitable for an offspring critter.
      Returns:
      interpreter instance for offspring behavior
